description: A winter scene needs atmospheric effects. Add a 'Particles' effect (snow, sparkles, or similar) to the scene '/home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/dwanko_run.tnz' so it is overlaid on the character animation. Render the composite result as a PNG sequence of at least 24 frames to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/particle_snow/', ensuring the particles are visible in the rendered output.
